title: Accountant
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Academic Work Finland Oy in Espoo seeks a skilled accountant for their growing organization. Fluent in English and Finnish, you'll support financial administrat
description: We are looking for an experienced accountant with a strong background in financial administration, preferably accounting, to join our growing organization in Espoo. This role involves supporting general accounting tasks such as reconciliations, closing month's shifts, and ensuring accurate financial processes. The ideal candidate will thrive in a rapidly evolving environment and bring out the value of expertise as the organization matures around them. Fluent written and oral Finnish and English language skills are required, along with strong communication and attention to detail. Experience with NetSuite is also preferred. We offer competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements, partial remote work opportunities, and an Epassi lunch reduction.
what_we_expect: A suitable higher education background in financial administration, preferably in accounting.

Strong practical knowledge and work experience in general accounting activities; reconciliations, closing the month's shift, accounting equipment, reconciliation of balance sheet items, and a strong understanding of accounting principles.
Fluent written and oral Finnish and English language skills.
job_responsibilities: Supports the client with general accounting and month-end closing activities.
Develops and documents processes in close cooperation with other team members.
The opportunity to work in a global growing organization
what_we_offer: The opportunity to work in a global growing organization
The opportunity to influence and bring out the value of your expertise as the organization matures around you
The opportunity to influence everyday activities and develop them with your own ideas.
Partial remote work (2 days/week) and Epassi lunch reduction
search_keywords: accountant espoo, accounting general, finance job Espoo

description: We are looking for an electrician in the Turku region who shares our vision for working in the electrical industry. This role requires basic installation experience based on pictures and connecting centers. Visio Sähkö Oy supports your work but expects you to manage progress independently. If you meet these requirements, apply now by visiting the link provided or submitting an application via our system.

title: The waiter
company: Smokey Road Diner & Bar Oy, Kokkola
meta_description: Smokey Road Diner & Bar Oy is seeking a friendly waiter for its launch, offering excellent customer service and a relaxed atmosphere. Part-time or full-time
description: Smokey Road Diner & Bar is seeking new employees to join its team, offering an exciting opportunity to contribute to a launch of a new restaurant that combines American-style diner atmosphere with smoked food and relaxed bar culture. The company emphasizes high-quality products, excellent customer service, and smooth teamwork. Positions are available for part-time or full-time employment. Key responsibilities include preparing food, managing reservations, serving drinks and wines, and maintaining the cleanliness of the dining area. Applicants should possess good interaction skills and be willing to work in variable situations. The restaurant offers an encouraging and cooperative work environment, as well as opportunities to develop personal skills.
what_we_expect: Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Willingness to work also in urgent situations
A dispensing pass is considered an advantage
job_responsibilities: Receiving orders and working in the serving area.
what_we_offer: The opportunity to participate in the launch of a new restaurant
An encouraging and cooperative work environment
Versatile tasks
The opportunity to develop one's own skills
search_keywords: waiter, kitchen worker, restaurant opening, customer service, employee position, job duties, requirements, benefits, collective agreement

title: Infra pipe fitter for a data site, Lahti
meta_description: Visio Henkilöstöratkaisut Päijät-Häme Oy is seeking a Infra pipe fitter with experience in data center infrastructure projects at Lahti's data site. Competitive
description: We are looking for an Infra pipe fitter with experience in data center infrastructure projects to join our team at Lahti's data site. This role offers competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements and provides a permanent position starting immediately. Applicants must have valid occupational safety cards, excellent Finnish language skills, and high work ethic. A strong social presence is also required for effective teamwork. The job involves installing infrared pipes alongside other tasks such as HVAC installation and bathroom finishing. Vision's employee promise includes an hourly wage of €18/h, monthly salary payments, orientation to the role, suitable equipment for each task, round-the-clock support, and opportunities for skill development and career advancement.
what_we_expect: Education in the construction industry - the work is responsible and the basic education must be in order.
Experience in the task - we are looking for a professional who makes things go smoothly and doesn't have to be on watch
Good Finnish language skills - the management language is Finnish.
job_responsibilities: Working as part of a site team
what_we_offer: Hourly wage €18/h
Salary payment twice a month
Orientation to work
Work equipment suitable for each job
Round-the-clock support in work matters
(Good guys are always in demand and we will help you find new jobs when the fixed-term employment ends. (for fixed-term employment))
search_keywords: infrastructure pipe fitter, infrared pipe installer, Lahti data center site
